text.title: progressive-disclosure-skills Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for progressive-disclosure-skills as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Pasting an entire reference document inline as a fenced code block in SKILL.md.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Defeats progressive disclosure — the reference now loads on every activation, even for sub-tasks that never touch it.

failure-mode.description: Documenting the procedure in the description field instead of in SKILL.md body.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The procedure now loads on every request — defeats the entire point of leveling.

failure-mode.description: SKILL.md grows past ~500 lines because the author keeps adding examples, edge cases, and runbooks inline.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Activated body sits in context for the rest of the turn; bloated bodies bust prompt cache, raise per-call cost, and crowd out tool results.

failure-mode.description: Description is one sentence of marketing copy ("comprehensive deployment automation skill").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Router cannot match — the user says "deploy faion.net", description has neither word, skill never activates.

failure-mode.description: Pasting a 1500-line runbook, schema, or sample dataset directly into a fenced code block in SKILL.md.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Inlined files load on every activation, including sub-tasks that never use them — kills the second level's whole purpose.
